channel.title: review on Dr. Soumyo Maity
channel.description: Recent content in review on Dr. Soumyo Maity

item.title: Code Review: A Peer's Eye View
item.description: Code review is a process where one or more developers inspect another developer’s code to find potential errors, security vulnerabilities, and other defects. It is an important part of any software development process, as it can help to improve the quality of the code and prevent defects from reaching production. There are two main types of code reviews: formal and informal. Formal code reviews are typically conducted by a team of developers, while informal code reviews can be conducted by a single developer or a small group of developers.
